name: Instagram Followers
description: Users who follow this Instagram account, paginated through the friendships REST endpoint.

followers.description: Full list of followers, ordered as returned by Instagram's friendships endpoint

pk.description: Follower's Instagram primary key (numeric user id, as string)

username.description: Follower's Instagram handle without the leading @

full_name.description: Follower's display name (may be empty string)

is_private.description: True if the follower's account is private

is_verified.description: True if the follower has the verified badge

profile_pic_url.description: URL of the follower's profile picture

is_possible_scammer.description: True if Instagram has flagged the account as a possible scammer

has_anonymous_profile_picture.description: True if the follower has not set a custom profile picture
